case_title: LUCKSON CHIU VS. SHERMAN, JOSEPH AND MOROSO CONSTRUCTION ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF JOSEPH L. SHERMAN FILED BY DEFENDANT SHERMAN, JOSEPH AND MOROSO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC. SERVED JAN-03-2020, MAIL AS TO PLAINTIFF CHIU, LUCKSON
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT MOROSO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
TRIAL BRIEF OF DEFENDANT JOSEPH L. SHERMAN FILED BY DEFENDANT SHERMAN, JOSEPH AND MOROSO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LUCKSON CHIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH SHERMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MOROSO CONSTRUCTION INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUSTINE SEARS, OWNER AND THOMAS MADSEN, SUPERINTENDENT. DEFENDANTS WAIVE ANY SERVICE ISSUES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIU, LUCKSON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHERMAN, JOSEPH AND MOROSO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC. MOROSO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PROVE THAT HIS ACTIONS IN ASSISTING DELIVERY AND DIRECTING TRAFFIC CONSTITUTES AN IMPLIED IN FACT CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,682.00 FILED BY CHIU, LUCKSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHERMAN, JOSEPH AND MOROSO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC. MOROSO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHERMAN, JOSEPH AND MOROSO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-07-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
